trickyParts: Cross-family review caught that POST /workers/prune had a leak window: persistState() before deleteSession() meant a crash between them could orphan sessions. Fixed by moving deleteSession before persistState.
Cross-family review caught that POST /workers replacing dead workers never deleted the old session. Added deleteSession call before replacing dead worker entries.
deviations: No formal plan existed in issue comments — implemented directly from the bug report description
Added deleteSession to POST /workers dead-worker-replacement path (not in original scope but identified by cross-family review as necessary)
openQuestions: Pre-existing test failure: 'passes controller env vars to adapter.start on startup' in index.test.ts — fails on main, unrelated to this PR
ClaudeCodeAdapter.deleteSession is a no-op — tmux windows persist by design, but could accumulate if not cleaned up
